name: Faux Marble Accent Table White - Threshold™
description:
This Faux Marble Accent Table from Threshold™ brings modern style to your living space. Made from white faux marble with a black pattern, it showcases an inverted L-shape and a C cutout base for a unique look. Place this accent table next to a sofa in your living room or between two chairs to hold a cup of coffee, a flower vase and your latest read, or use it as an end table anywhere in your home.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
